# delegate

**Instance Property**

The error-handling delegate of the receiver.

## Declaration

```swift
var delegate: (any SBApplicationDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The delegate should implement the [doc://com.apple.Scripting-Bridge/documentation/ScriptingBridge/SBApplicationDelegate/eventDidFail(_:withError:)] method of the [doc://com.apple.Scripting-Bridge/documentation/ScriptingBridge/SBApplicationDelegate] informal protocol.
title: delegate
